source_jobs.title: Founding Product Manager - Berlin
source_jobs.description:
🌎 WHAT WE DO


WE BUILD SOFTWARE TO ENABLE SUSTAINABLE AGRICULTURE SUPPLY CHAINS.

~31% of global GHG emissions originate from food-related activities. For the first time in history, climate performance has become an overall business performance indicator. Enterprises are mandated by regulatory bodies to disclose their climate performance, which leads to increasing pressure from investors, competitors, retailers, and consumers to prevent and reduce their CO2e emissions. Over the next 10 years, companies have set ambitious reduction targets that need to be met. Enterprise software and new business processes can help - to make processes in the day-to-day more efficient, connect farmers better to their partners and thus, enable action in supply chains.

We raised >€10m in funding in the first 2 years of our existence, we launched our enterprise product, signed and onboarded some of the largest F&B players in Europe, and put together what we believe is the best-suited early stage tech team in Europe.

Today Root is the #1 primary data collection platform for dairy in DACH. We are AI-enabled at the core and driving the AI transformation across the food and agri world. The next chapter is bigger.

 
 


🔭 WHAT YOU WILL WORK ON


YOUR MISSION

Build an innovative operating system for the dairy industry from 0 to 1, at the intersection of farmers and dairies.

Dairy is Root's home market. We know it inside out - the players, the workflows, the technology gaps, the people. We see a category-defining opportunity to build a new product line that sits between farmers and dairy processors, and that has the potential to become the connecting piece of our portfolio.

This is a genuinely greenfield role. You will not inherit a backlog. You will define what we build, why, and for whom - then prove it works with a handful of pilot customers before we scale.




WHAT YOUR JOB WILL LOOK LIKE:

 - Run deep discovery. Spend weeks with farmers, farm technicians, milk procurement teams, and dairy executives on-site. Understand their jobs, KPIs, and frustrations from the inside.

 - Define new workflows together with our customers. Shape how dairy companies will work in the future. This product line is about setting a new standard, not digitising what already exists - while AI will be at the core of it.

 - Build hacky prototypes and run pilots. Show, do not tell. Get something tangible in front of 2-3 design partners within weeks.

 - Assess desirability, feasibility, and viability before we commit serious engineering investment.

 - Define the v1 spec with engineering and design once we have conviction. Set the team up for delivery.

 - Onboard the first paying customers and iterate fast. Own the loop.

 - Decide what we will NOT build. Scope discipline is critical with limited engineering capacity and a customer base that operates on a fixed annual cycle.

You will work side by side with the Head of Product to make the bet, and own the product line end-to-end as it grows. Engineering and design support will scale with traction.




WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE AT 6 MONTHS:

 - A first end-to-end prototype tested with real customers

 - 3 signed Letters of Intent from new customers

 - A concrete, evidence-backed set of build hypotheses for v1
   
    


🦾 HOW WE SUPPORT YOU

You will report directly to our Head of Product.

Some of our angel investors that will actively mentor you:

 - Mengting Bönsch (Founder & ex-CEO @Kitchenstories) - 0 to 1 product in food

 - Alexander Argyros (Founder @BlueLayer, ex-founder @Moonfare) - founder craft and early-stage discovery

 - Jan Philipp Thomsen (VP Product @Celonis) - scaling enterprise B2B SaaS

 - Vassili Samolis (Director Product @Doordash, ex-Instagram, ex-Pinterest) - product discovery at scale

It is important to us to give you the best conditions for learning and career growth. This is why we have designed our cap table in a way that all our early employees get functional experts as mentors by your sid

source_jobs.title: Climate Advisory
source_jobs.description:
No previous experience in the climate space? Don't worry, we are happy to help you grow into a climate expert and thought leader at Root! This role requires presence in our Berlin office and both German and English language skills.




🌎 WHAT WE DO


WE BUILD SOFTWARE THAT HELPS COMPANIES ALONG THE FOOD SYSTEM GET TO NET ZERO.

~31% of global GHG emissions originate from food-related activities. For the first time in history, climate performance has become an overall business performance indicator. Enterprises are mandated by regulatory bodies to disclose their climate performance, which leads to increasing pressure from investors, competitors, retailers, and consumers to prevent and reduce their CO2e emissions. Over the next 10 years, companies have set ambitious reduction targets that need to be met. Enterprise software and new business processes can help.

We raised >€10m in funding in the first 2 years of our existence, we launched our enterprise product, signed and onboarded some of the largest F&B players in Europe, and put together what we believe is the best-suited early stage tech team in Europe. Will you be the next to join us? 🚀






🔭 WHAT YOU WILL WORK ON


YOUR MISSION

Support our customers in calculating their Corporate Carbon Footprint and setting Net Zero Targets that drive climate impact.




OVER THE NEXT 12 MONTHS YOU WILL:

 1. Make sense of Corporate Carbon Footprints
    
    - Use our RootOS to independently run Corporate Carbon Footprint (CCF) projects, ensuring data quality, accuracy, and consistency
    
    - Translate emission analyses into clear, decision-ready outputs (Excel, PPT) for both technical and executive audiences
    
    - Stay current on GHG Protocol and SBTi developments

 2. Manage Projects and Accounts
    
    - Own the full project lifecycle: timelines, stakeholder expectations, data collection, and emission analysis
    
    - Manage multiple projects simultaneously across a diverse customer base
    
    - Collaborate with internal Account Management and Customer Success to maintain account health
    
    - Collect customer feedback and work with our Product team to improve our software and offering

 3. Empower clients to achieve their climate goals
    
    - Analyze CO₂ emission patterns and derive corporate-level reduction measures
    
    - Support customers in setting credible climate targets
    
    - Build lasting connections with customers and become the person they turn to for climate advice




🚀  YOU MIGHT BE REALLY GOOD FOR THIS ROLE IF YOU

 - Have hands-on experience with carbon accounting standards (e.g. GHG Protocol) and have delivered corporate carbon footprints end-to-end, for clients or in-house

 - Are comfortable in client-facing roles, managing multiple projects and building strong customer relationships

 - Bring strong quantitative skills and can navigate complex datasets

 - Can translate analysis into clear, high-quality presentations and dashboards for internal stakeholder use

 - Are organized and self-directed, able to work autonomously in a fast-paced startup environment

 - Are fluent in German (C1+) and English
   
   

You don't feel like you fulfill all the criteria? We get it: confidence can sometimes hold us back from applying for a job. But guess what?! There is no such thing as a 'perfect' candidate. The only thing you need to ensure along the recruiting process and beyond is that the problem that we are solving with Root is one you cannot wait to get out of bed for on Monday morning! 🤗






🦾 HOW WE SUPPORT YOU

 - You will work closely with Luca, our Team Lead for the Corporate Climate Journey

 - You will collaborate as part of a cross-disciplinary team that brings together sales and account managers, product experts and customer success specialists






🎢 HIRING PROCESS

Our ambition is to offer you an end-to-end experience that is fast and uncomplicated - we aim to keep the end-to-end process to 10 working days. We send you pre

source_jobs.title: Full Stack Engineer
source_jobs.description:
🌎 WHAT WE DO




ROOT IS EUROPE’S #1 PRIMARY DATA COLLECTION PLATFORM FOR F&B COMPANIES. WE HELP OUR CUSTOMERS TO MEASURE AND REDUCE FARM-LEVEL EMISSIONS.

~31% of global GHG emissions originate from food-related activities. For the first time in history, climate performance has become an overall business performance indicator. Enterprises are mandated by regulatory bodies to disclose their climate performance, which leads to increasing pressure from investors, competitors, retailers, and consumers to prevent and reduce their CO2e emissions. Over the next 10 years, companies have set ambitious reduction targets that need to be met. Unlike other industries, the vast majority of F&B emissions originate from farms (known as Scope 3.1 emissions) and are highly complex to address. Root exists to help overcome this challenge.

We raised >€10m in funding in the first 2 years of our existence, we launched our enterprise product, signed and onboarded some of the largest F&B players in Europe, and put together what we believe is the best-suited early-stage tech team in Europe. Will you be the next to join us? 🚀




🔭 WHAT YOU WILL WORK ON




YOUR MISSION

Build and scale our software products with a sense of full ownership.



In the first 6 months, your focus will be on

 - Coding (this is a very hands-on role) our web application – frontend, backend and infrastructure

 - Adjusting and expanding our tech stack where necessary

 - Setting up and improving our infrastructure set-up – with a focus on database structure, data pipelines and analytics, which is a big part of the value we offer to our customers

 - Setting the foundations for our engineering practices in line with our broader operating model to attract and retain the best engineering talent in Europe
   
   

Tech Stack

 - Our tech stack, much like our business and product, is still in its early stage. Joining at this point means you will still play a key role in defining what tools and technologies we will use to build up Root Global for years to come!

 - Our product consists of multiple web applications our customers use, based on a backend consisting of user input data (procurement, product composition, etc.) calculation models, and plug-ins to various emission factor/LCA databases

 - Frontend: React and Next.js

 - Backend: Node.js w/Typescript, Nest.js, PostgreSQL

 - Infra: AWS
   
   


🧺 WHAT YOU BRING ALONG

Based on what you know on the role 👆 you are the best evaluator to decide if you believe this is a role you will be able to thrive in.

These are some things that would help:

 - You have built full-stack web applications before – that people are actually using

 - You have worked in an early stage VC-backed startup (pre-seed/seed), preferably with a B2B business model

 - You feel comfortable with broad product requirements and enjoy participating in the product conceptualisation phase

 - You feel comfortable guiding teams through technical troubleshooting and delivering feedback on topics beyond technical performance.
   
   


🎢 HIRING PROCESS

Our ambition is to offer you an end-to-end experience that is fast and uncomplicated. Every step is a conversation, which is both an opportunity to meet more of the team as well as express yourself.

 1. 45 min Intro with the CTO. Goal: Get to know each other, introduce Root Global and the role in more detail, and align on baseline expectations.

 2. 60min Technical Interview with one Engineer from the team. Goal: Discuss your technical experience, how it overlaps with the challenges ahead of us and what you can expect from the day-to-day of an Engineer at Root Global.

 3. Approx. 2 hour office visit, where you will 1) meet the rest of the Engineering team on a team session where you will dive into our product and a real world scenario and 2) one or two (depending on availability) 30min coffee chats or walks - weather allowing - to get to know other team members outside of the Engineering team.



🤗 You don't fee

source_jobs.title: Product Manager - Berlin
source_jobs.description:
🌎 WHAT WE DO


WE BUILD SOFTWARE TO ENABLE SUSTAINABLE AGRICULTURE SUPPLY CHAINS.

~31% of global GHG emissions originate from food-related activities. For the first time in history, climate performance has become an overall business performance indicator. Enterprises are mandated by regulatory bodies to disclose their climate performance, which leads to increasing pressure from investors, competitors, retailers, and consumers to prevent and reduce their CO2e emissions. Over the next 10 years, companies have set ambitious reduction targets that need to be met. Enterprise software and new business processes can help - to make processes in the day-to-day more efficient, connect farmers better to their partners and thus, enable action in supply chains.

We raised >€10m in funding in the first 2 years of our existence, we launched our enterprise product, signed and onboarded some of the largest F&B players in Europe, and put together what we believe is the best-suited early stage tech team in Europe.

Today Root is the #1 primary data collection platform for dairy in DACH. We are AI-enabled at the core and driving the AI transformation across the food and agri world. The next chapter is bigger.

 
 


🔭 WHAT YOU WILL WORK ON


YOUR MISSION

Build on top of Europe's #1 primary data collection platform and bring it to new heights - new markets, new commodities, ready for action.

You will own our core product line end-to-end. Today it is the leading platform in Europe for collecting farm-level data at scale. Tomorrow it needs to be the foundation that powers the next decade of agricultural decarbonization. That means making the product ready for action, expanding into new commodities, and bringing it to new geographies across Europe.




WHAT YOUR JOB WILL LOOK LIKE:

 - Own the product line end-to-end. From discovery to delivery to ongoing maintenance. You decide what gets built, when, and why.

 - Lead an engineering and design squad. Set the pace, manage tradeoffs, keep the team focused on what matters. Routines, rituals, prioritization - that is on you.

 - Prioritize across competing demands. Customer escalations, internal stakeholder asks, methodology updates, expansion bets. You will rarely have enough capacity for all of it. Make the calls that move the needle, communicate them clearly.

 - Go deep on methodology. Calculators, data sources, agricultural emission factors. The product is only as good as the science underneath. You will become one of the most knowledgeable people in Europe on how farm-level emissions get calculated.

 - Drive expansion into new markets and commodities. Run discovery in new geographies, pressure-test our offering with local customers, decide where we double down and where we pull back.

 - Make it action-ready. Data collection is the foundation. Reduction is where customer value compounds. Shape how our primary data product becomes the launchpad for everything we build on top of it.

 - Ship. We are still early stage. Time-to-customer-value beats perfection. Builder mentality is non-negotiable.
   
    


🦾 HOW WE SUPPORT YOU

You will report directly to our Head of Product.

Some of our angel investors that will actively mentor you:

 - Jan Philipp Thomsen (VP Product @Celonis) - scaling enterprise B2B SaaS

 - Vassili Samolis (Director Product @Doordash, ex-Instagram, ex-Pinterest) - product discovery at scale

It is important to us to give you the best conditions for learning and career growth. This is why we have designed our cap table in a way that all our early employees get functional experts as mentors by your side.




🧺 WHAT YOU BRING ALONG



You might be a good fit if you can demonstrate the following things:

 - 2-3 years of product management experience, ideally at an early-stage B2B SaaS company that shipped at a high pace.

 - Strong prioritization is your superpower. You can hold customer escalations, internal stakeholder asks, and long-term bets in your head at the same time, a

source_jobs.title: Freelance Customer Success Manager – Polish-Speaking
source_jobs.description:
No previous experience in the climate space? Don't worry, we are happy to help you grow into a climate expert at Root!




🌎 WHAT WE DO

We build software that helps companies along the food system get to Net Zero.

~31% of global GHG emissions originate from food-related activities. For the first time in history, climate performance has become an overall business performance indicator. Enterprises are mandated by regulatory bodies to disclose their climate performance, which leads to increasing pressure from investors, competitors, retailers, and consumers to prevent and reduce their CO2e emissions. Over the next 10 years, companies have set ambitious reduction targets that need to be met. Enterprise software and new business processes can help.

We raised >€10m in funding in the first 2 years of our existence, we launched our enterprise product, signed and onboarded some of the largest F&B players in Europe, and put together what we believe is the best-suited early stage tech team in Europe. Will you be the next to join us? 🚀






🔭 WHAT THIS FREELANCE ROLE LOOKS LIKE




THIS IS NOT A FULL- OR PART-TIME POSITION. WE'RE LOOKING FOR A FREELANCER TO SUPPORT OUR POLISH-SPEAKING CUSTOMERS ON A PROJECT BASIS. AFTER AN INITIAL ONBOARDING PHASE, YOU WILL TAKE ON ASSIGNMENTS AS NEEDED, PRIMARILY RUNNING VIRTUAL TRAININGS AND SUPPORTING CUSTOMERS THROUGH KEY PHASES OF OUR PLATFORM.


EXPECT LOW AND IRREGULAR HOURS — THIS ROLE SUITS SOMEONE WHO HAS OTHER ENGAGEMENTS AND IS LOOKING FOR FLEXIBLE, PROJECT-BASED WORK IN THE SUSTAINABILITY SPACE.

Your assignments will typically include:

 - Running virtual trainings with Polish-speaking customers, guiding them through the Root Platform (onboarding, data collection workflows, reporting features)

 - Supporting customer projects during active data collection phases — answering questions, ensuring data quality, and driving completion

 - Acting as a trusted point of contact for Polish-speaking users (primarily agricultural stakeholders), helping them navigate the platform and understand its value

 - Flagging risks and opportunities to the internal Customer Success team, including churn signals, product feedback, and user engagement patterns




🚀 WHAT YOU BRING ALONG

 - Native-level Polish (written and spoken) — this is a hard requirement

 - Professional proficiency in English, our internal working language. German skills beneficial.

 - Experience in Customer Success, Account Management, or Customer-Facing Operations, ideally in a B2B SaaS environment

 - Comfortable with virtual training delivery (webinars, workshops, screen-sharing sessions)

 - Self-organized, reliable, and able to work independently with minimal supervision

 - Bonus: familiarity with sustainability, carbon accounting, or agricultural supply chains or experience with data collection platforms or survey/assessment tools



You don't feel like you fulfill all the criteria? We get it: confidence can sometimes hold us back from applying for a job. But guess what?! There is no such thing as a 'perfect' candidate. The only thing you need to ensure along the recruiting process and beyond is that the problem that we are solving with Root is one you cannot wait to get out of bed for on Monday morning! 🤗




🦾 HOW WE SUPPORT YOU

 - You will collaborate as part of a cross-disciplinary team that brings together sales and account managers, product experts and customer success specialists




🎢 CONTRACTING PROCESS

Our ambition is to offer you an end-to-end experience that is fast and uncomplicated - we aim to keep the end-to-end process to 10 working days. We send you prep material for each step and maximise transparency at every step.

Root Global is an equal opportunity employer, which means we do not discriminate on the basis of race, colour, religion, marital status, age, national origin, ancestry, physical or mental disability, medical condition, pregnancy, genetic information, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity o

notes: Software for sustainable agriculture supply chains, climate performance focus
